content: Owner-provided photo extraction for InTheWake ship pages: base64-encoded images in Ken's chat attachments are stored inline in /root/.claude/projects/-home-user/*.jsonl conversation logs. Python script filters on message.role='user' and absence of toolUseResult/sourceToolAssistantUUID to isolate owner-uploaded photos. License = 'All rights reserved' per Ken's directive. Caption pattern: 'Photo by Ken Baker (InTheWake), <location>, <date> · all rights reserved'.
